domain: musical instrument hardware, stage equipment, pedals, stands, and tuning mechanisms

ideas.product_context: Electric guitar floating tremolo bridge hardware
ideas.core_function: Allows fine string intonation adjustment while clamping the saddle against vibrational movement
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined saddle block with captive screw channel, string witness groove, clamp face, and radiused bridge contact underside
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines angled string paths, small threaded adjustment features, asymmetric bearing surfaces, and precise contact geometry in one compact part

ideas.core_function: Converts footboard motion into beater rotation with a non-linear response curve
ideas.likely_main_part: Eccentric machined cam hub with axle bore, chain anchor slot, set-screw flats, and variable-radius outer profile
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires representing non-circular curves, offset bores, clamping details, and functional clearance around a rotating assembly

ideas.core_function: Locks the top cymbal to the pull rod while allowing controlled felt compression
ideas.likely_main_part: Knurled cylindrical collar with split clamp, cross screw boss, stepped felt seat, and central rod bore
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests concentric stepped geometry, split clamp gaps, knurl-like grip surfaces, and small fastener bosses

ideas.product_context: Modular guitar effects pedalboard mounting system
ideas.core_function: Secures an effects pedal to a slotted rail without permanent adhesive or hook-and-loop material
ideas.likely_main_part: Low-profile machined clamp shoe with dovetail rail engagement, eccentric locking tab, and pedal flange capture lip
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Involves undercuts, dovetail interfaces, low-clearance sliding features, and geometry tied to repeated user adjustment

ideas.idea_title: Mic Stand Boom Angle Rosette Joint
ideas.core_function: Locks a boom arm at repeatable angular positions without slipping under microphone weight
ideas.likely_main_part: Toothed rosette hinge disk with central pivot bore, radial locking teeth, compression washer seat, and boom socket boss
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests radial tooth arrays, circular symmetry with localized bosses, mating friction surfaces, and load-bearing hinge geometry

ideas.product_context: String fine tuner mounted on a violin tailpiece
ideas.core_function: Transfers screw motion into small string tension changes for precise pitch tuning
ideas.likely_main_part: Miniature lever frame with string hook, pivot ears, screw contact pad, and tailpiece mounting saddle
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires tiny functional features, curved string contact paths, pivot geometry, and tight spatial relationships between interacting mechanisms

ideas.product_context: Stage drum hardware stand height positioning
ideas.core_function: Clamps around a stand tube to preserve repeatable height and orientation during setup
ideas.likely_main_part: Split ring collar with hinged lug, indexed orientation notch, thumb-screw boss, and internal tube relief groove
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests split circular bodies, hinge-and-clamp features, ergonomic screw placement, and internal cylindrical fit constraints

ideas.product_context: Guitar or synthesizer expression pedal enclosure
ideas.core_function: Supports smooth rocker motion and transfers position to an internal sensor linkage
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined pivot block with dual bearing bores, rocker stop faces, sensor linkage slot, and enclosure mounting feet
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines aligned bearing geometry, motion stops, linkage clearance, and structural mounting surfaces in a compact mechanism

ideas.core_function: Locks telescoping support tubes at selectable width or height settings
ideas.likely_main_part: Spring-loaded latch housing with plunger bore, angled thumb pad, tube saddle radius, and detent pin guide
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires nested cylindrical interfaces, spring/plunger accommodation, ergonomic external shape, and precise alignment with repeated adjustment holes

ideas.idea_title: Guitar Tuning Machine Worm Gear Bracket
ideas.core_function: Holds the worm shaft in alignment with the string post gear while mounting to the headstock
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined tuner bracket with two raised bearing towers, worm shaft bores, string post clearance pocket, and screw mounting ears
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests multi-axis alignment, small bearing supports, gear clearance pockets, thin mounting tabs, and ornamental yet functional hardware geometry
